reviews.comment:
El empleado que carga el combustible nos quiso robar: no puso en cero la máquina y estábamos distraídos. Nos dijo que eran 2500$ y lo pagamos.
Salimos y unas cuadras más adelante nos dimos cuenta que el marcador del combustible no se había movido entonces regresamos y buscalos al mismo empleado. Nos cargó el tanque entonces y sólo pañales 400$, cuidado!!!!!!! Un estafador

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendant tried to rip us off: he didn't reset the pump and we were distracted. He told us it was $2500 and we paid.
We left and a few blocks later we realized the gas gauge hadn't moved, so we went back and found the same attendant. He filled the tank then and charged us $400 for diapers! Beware! A scammer!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoM0ozMVhnEAE

reviews.comment:
El servicio no es muy rápido, porque es casi la última bomba bencinera antes de llegar a la frontera Argentina, y por eso hay demasiada filas de vehículos esperando su turno, cabe destacar que la bencina es muy barata en comparación con Chile, hay una diferencia muy grande.

(Translated by Google)
The service isn't very fast, because it's almost the last gas station before reaching the Argentinian border, and that's why there are too many lines of vehicles waiting their turn. It's worth noting that gasoline is very cheap compared to Chile; there's a very big difference.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoek9DTzZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros muy displicentes. Me da igual si la cantidad de autos los supera.
Los baños nos dijeron que estaban clausurados porque estaban "tapados"... país bananero es decir poco.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very indifferent. I don't care if there are more cars than they can handle.
They told us the restrooms were closed because they were "clogged"... calling it a banana republic is an understatement.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoLWRlQ19RRRAB
